---
title: "Assignment NN — <Lecture Title>"
subtitle: "Course: <Course Title>"
date: YYYY-MM-DD
due-date: YYYY-MM-DD
week: NN
authors:
  - name: "Prof. Dr. Andre Guettler"
    affiliation: "Institute of Strategic Management and Finance, Ulm University"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrartcl
solutions: false
---

## Overview

> **Due:** YYYY-MM-DD, 23:59 (CET) via Moodle.
> **Submission format:** PDF (one file per student or group).
> **Group size:** 1–3 students (declare group composition in the cover page).

## Learning goals

::: {.callout-note title="This assignment will help you"}
- Goal 1
- Goal 2
- Goal 3
:::

## Required materials

- Lecture slides for Week NN.
- Reading: Author (Year), *Title*, Section X.
- Dataset: `data/<filename>.csv` (link or path).

---

## Question 1 — <Short title>  *(N points)*

State the question clearly. Provide any necessary data, formulas, or assumptions.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution sketch.** …
:::

## Question 2 — <Short title>  *(N points)*

(a) Sub-question.

(b) Sub-question.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution sketch.**

(a) …

(b) …
:::

## Question 3 — <Short title>  *(N points)*

State the question.

::: {.content-visible when-meta="solutions"}
**Solution sketch.** …
:::

---

## Grading rubric

| Criterion | Weight |
|---|---|
| Correctness of derivations | 40% |
| Clarity of argumentation | 30% |
| Quality of empirical / numerical work | 20% |
| Presentation (formatting, references) | 10% |

## Honor code

By submitting this assignment, you confirm that the work is your own (or your group's), that all sources are cited, and that you have not used unauthorized aids.
